weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by a diverse set of vulnerabilities, with 15 unique CVEs tracked across various domains, including AI/ML threats, cloud/IAM, and web/servers. The most active day was July 3, 2026, with a range of CVEs identified, including CVE-2026-26145, CVE-2026-50721, and CVE-2026-12413, among others. Each of these CVEs was observed only once, indicating a broad but relatively shallow threat landscape, with no single vulnerability dominating the landscape, and active security domains spanning multiple areas, including containers, crypto libraries, and identity/authentication.
